title: UACP Device Retirement
description: Records the retirement of a device key. Events with a timestamp after retired_at from the retired device MUST be rejected.

device_id.description: RFC 4122 v4 UUID of the device being retired.

retired_at.description: Milliseconds since Unix epoch when this device was retired.

retired_by.description: Identity public key (32 bytes, base64url) of the user who retired this device.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature (64 bytes, base64url) by retired_by over canonical CBOR of all fields except signature.
